$comment: Layer C for PAYSLIP vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. OPEN/WRITE/CLOSE are flow-neutral for the symbolic store (the record's MOVEs are ordinary modeled storage); the tax's ROUNDED half-cent boundary is congruence-solved on the single path, and every realized case runs through the file-serializing wrapper differentially.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 PAYSLIP (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-payslip, file-serializing wrapper)
